expectations.desc: bg-remove writes the matte to assets/cutouts/<name>.png AND stages a copy to remotion-project/public/cutouts/<name>.png (both exist, non-empty PNG).
the produced cutout PNG carries an alpha pix_fmt (e.g. rgba/ya8) per ffprobe — a real transparent matte, not an opaque image.

capture writes >=1 screenshot PNG under remotion-project/public/captures/<slug>/ so staticFile("captures/<slug>/<file>.png") resolves; design tokens (if any) land in assets/captures/<slug>/extracted/.
a missing/unreadable source image or an unreachable ai-gen proxy / capture URL is recorded and exits non-zero with no asset written — no fabricated or substituted file, no runtime prompt.
